name: mcp-web-validator
description: W3C HTML/CSS Validator and Technical SEO Audit MCP Server for AI coding assistants.

tools.name: validate_local_html
tools.description: Validates local HTML syntax and structure using the official W3C Nu HTML Checker.

tools.name: validate_url
tools.description: Validates live website HTML syntax and structure by URL using the official W3C Nu HTML Checker.

tools.name: validate_local_css
tools.description: Checks local CSS syntax and W3C Jigsaw compliance.

tools.name: audit_seo_metadata
tools.description: Runs local technical SEO audits for titles, descriptions, headings, images, and Open Graph tags.

tools.name: check_broken_links
tools.description: Scans HTML files to detect broken internal or external hyperlinks and return status codes.

tools.name: validate_schema_markup
tools.description: Identifies and validates JSON-LD structured schema blocks for syntax and standards.

tools.name: generate_validation_report
tools.description: Runs all validators and builds a unified PageSpeed-inspired markdown report card.

tools.name: capture_screenshots
tools.description: Launches local headless Puppeteer to capture layout screenshots at multiple responsive viewports.
